Pixar 3D animation style, adult woman approximately 40s, light peachy skin tone with rosy cheeks. Medium-length curly/wavy strawberry blonde hair falling past shoulders. Large round dark-framed glasses, warm brown eyes with characteristic Pixar exaggerated proportions. Round soft face with a small nose and full cheeks. Slightly curvy, average build. Signature outfit: grey V-neck knit sweater, blue denim jeans, brown flat shoes, pearl necklace, and small pearl stud earrings.
